title: Chimichurri Sauce
description: A bright, garlicky Argentine herb sauce with parsley, red wine vinegar, and olive oil. Works on steak, grilled chicken, fish, or vegetables.

instructions.text: Finely chop parsley and mince garlic. Combine with salt, red pepper flakes, red wine vinegar, and olive oil. Mix well.
Let sit at room temperature at least 15 minutes before serving. The longer it sits the better it gets.

notes:
Can be made up to a day ahead — refrigerate and bring back to room temperature before serving.

Works on steak, grilled chicken, fish, roasted vegetables, or as a dipping sauce for bread.
